changes.description: Section 4 subsection A — Why this lead won, from runner_up_why_not_lead_line + primary_concern_mode
changes.root_cause: runner_up_why_not_lead_line?: string confirmed at frontend/app/types/analysis.ts:192. primary_concern_mode?: PrimaryConcernModeV1 confirmed at frontend/app/types/analysis.ts:186. Enum values: distinct_lead | near_tie_ambiguity | technical_tiebreak_lead confirmed at frontend/app/types/analysis.ts:160-163. OVERLAP RISK: InsightPanel in contextOnly mode already renders runner_up_why_not_lead_line at InsightPanel.tsx:124 (inside showRunnerUp block, lines 117-126) and modeAudienceNote from primary_concern_mode at InsightPanel.tsx:135-137. Cursor MUST strip the runner-up block and ambiguity note from InsightPanel contextOnly rendering since Section 4 will own these fields. Failing to do so will render the same text twice on screen.
changes.scope_constraint: Must not read like an engine trace. If runner_up_why_not_lead_line is absent or empty, omit cleanly — do not fabricate rationale.

changes.description: Section 4 subsection B — Competing finding, from runner_up_topic_line
changes.root_cause: runner_up_topic_line?: string confirmed at frontend/app/types/analysis.ts:191. Comment at line 190 confirms: 'BE-W2-RQ2 — ranked runner-up from top_findings[1]; empty when not in close-call modes'. OVERLAP RISK: InsightPanel in contextOnly mode already renders runner_up_topic_line at InsightPanel.tsx:123 (inside showRunnerUp block). The showRunnerUp gate is: Boolean(runnerTopic) && (mode === near_tie_ambiguity || technical_tiebreak_lead) — InsightPanel.tsx:84-85. Cursor MUST suppress the InsightPanel runner-up block when Section 4 is present.
changes.scope_constraint: Max 1 competing finding. If runner_up_topic_line is absent, omit this block. Do not fabricate alternatives.

changes.description: Section 4 subsection C — How confident we are, from confidence_and_missing_data + data_quality.confidence_caveat
changes.root_cause: confidence_and_missing_data: string confirmed at frontend/app/types/analysis.ts:184 (required, non-optional). data_quality.confidence_caveat: string confirmed at frontend/app/types/analysis.ts:176 (required on data_quality). CRITICAL OVERLAP — CONFIDENCE_AND_MISSING_DATA: InsightPanel in contextOnly mode renders confidence_and_missing_data ALWAYS (not gated by contextOnly flag) at InsightPanel.tsx:154-156 as a plain amber-bordered line. Section 4 must own this field. Cursor must remove the confidenceLine block from InsightPanel.tsx (lines 153-156) or gate it behind !contextOnly so it renders only once — in Section 4. CONDITIONAL OVERLAP — CONFIDENCE_CAVEAT: PipelineStatus renders confidence_caveat as line2 only when !checksPassed && caveat && !missingChapterLine (PipelineStatus.tsx:62-63), and in the expanded detail section (PipelineStatus.tsx:104-106). Section 4 subsection C also uses confidence_caveat. Cursor must ensure that when data_quality_passed === false, the PipelineStatus and Section 4 renderings of confidence_caveat are not identical adjacent blocks — either suppress confidence_caveat from Section 4 when the quality-failure caveat is already prominent in PipelineStatus, or use a shortened form.
changes.scope_constraint: Do not show multiple overlapping confidence blocks. If both fields exist, shape into a single non-duplicative presentation. If content is thin, keep the block thin.

changes.description: Section 4 subsection D — What limits certainty, from page1 confidence/missing-data text
changes.root_cause: confidence_and_missing_data: string at frontend/app/types/analysis.ts:184 and confidence_caveat: string at frontend/app/types/analysis.ts:176 are the only available deterministic missing-data/uncertainty fields on the current DTO. No separate 'limitations' field exists. Subsection D derives from the same source material as subsection C — Cursor must shape C and D together into a non-duplicative single block unless the content is rich enough to warrant two distinct paragraphs (e.g., confidence framing vs. specific missing-data gap).
changes.scope_constraint: Maximum one short block. Do not create a 'limitations essay'. Focus on what is absent and why it matters — only if the field content supports that. Do not invent limitations text.

changes.description: Section 4 subsection E — Near-tie / co-primary mode, from primary_concern_mode + co_primary_signal_ids (presence check only)
changes.root_cause: primary_concern_mode?: PrimaryConcernModeV1 confirmed at frontend/app/types/analysis.ts:186. co_primary_signal_ids?: string[] confirmed at frontend/app/types/analysis.ts:187 — an array of signal ID strings, NOT prose. Prompt correctly states: co_primary_signal_ids may be used only as an internal presence check. Do not render raw signal IDs. OVERLAP RISK: InsightPanel in contextOnly mode renders co_primary_signal_ids as formatted display names at InsightPanel.tsx:128-133 (showCoPrimaryRow block) and the mode badge at InsightPanel.tsx:105. Section 4 subsection E must own the prose interpretation of the co-primary situation. Cursor must suppress the showCoPrimaryRow block from InsightPanel contextOnly rendering. The mode badge (InsightPanel.tsx:105) is header-level UI metadata — may be retained in InsightPanel as a badge classification but Section 4 must own the prose explanation.
changes.scope_constraint: Do not render raw signal IDs or formatted signal names from co_primary_signal_ids. Use only as presence indicator. Do not over-dramatise the co-primary situation. Do not surface raw ranking policy text.

changes.description: ranking_policy_version — subtle metadata only, already rendered sr-only in InsightPanel
changes.root_cause: ranking_policy_version?: string confirmed at frontend/app/types/analysis.ts:188. InsightPanel already renders this as sr-only (screen-reader only, not visible) at InsightPanel.tsx:106-108. Content shaping rule 5 in prompt confirms: retain only as subtle metadata/detail — do not elevate into main explanatory text. No duplication risk since InsightPanel's rendering is invisible. Section 4 should NOT add a second rendering of this field. If referenced at all, it must remain non-prominent.
changes.scope_constraint: Do not add a second visible rendering. InsightPanel sr-only rendering at line 107 satisfies the metadata requirement. Section 4 need not reference this field.

Do not use arbitration_result — not in frontend DTO, prohibited by prompt (line 60)

regression_protection: ResultsBodyOverview (Section 1) — must be unchanged; uses primary_concern independently
BalancedSystemsSummary (Section 2) — must be unchanged; uses balanced_systems_v1
PrimaryFindingAndWhy (Section 3) — must be unchanged; owns chains, evidence_for, evidence_against, missing_data

PipelineStatus (trust strip) — must be unchanged except for awareness of confidence_caveat overlap; uses data_quality.panel_completeness_*, data_quality_passed, lab_range_quality_by_primary_metric, confidence_caveat

InsightPanel (contextOnly) — WILL be adapted: runner-up block (lines 117-126), co-primary row (lines 128-133), ambiguity note (lines 135-137), and confidenceLine (lines 153-156) must be removed from contextOnly rendering; mode badge may be retained; not-contextOnly rendering must remain fully intact
Advanced analysis (ClinicianReportRenderer, InsightsPanel, tabs) — must remain functional and untouched
Navigation, loading, error states in results/page.tsx — must be unchanged
determinism_risks: NONE — sprint is purely frontend presentation rendering. No analytics logic, ranking, compiler, evaluator, or backend pipeline touched.

UX INTEGRITY RISK (non-analytics): InsightPanel contextOnly currently renders confidence_and_missing_data, runner-up block, co-primary row, and ambiguity note. Section 4 owns all of these. Without adaptation of InsightPanel, identical content will appear twice on screen. Cursor must strip these four blocks from InsightPanel contextOnly mode.
behavioural_surface_area: frontend/app/(app)/results/page.tsx — new Section 4 insertion between Section 3 (PrimaryFindingAndWhy, line 517) and PipelineStatus (line 518), or between PipelineStatus and InsightPanel (line 529), or after InsightPanel — all satisfy prompt requirement of 'after Section 3, before evidence-heavy layers'
frontend/app/components/insights/InsightPanel.tsx — mandatory adaptation: strip runner-up block, co-primary row, ambiguity note, and confidence line from contextOnly rendering path
new Section 4 wrapper component if no existing component can cleanly serve the role without conceptual confusion

arbitration_result — not in analysis.ts or any frontend type; prohibited by prompt
co_primary_context — not in DTO (previous BLOCKER-1, now resolved: prompt correctly uses co_primary_signal_ids at analysis.ts:187)
